violations.text: Batter was observed held at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC moved to refrigerator. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024
Drinks were observed stored on the floor in the storage area. Food and drinks must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the chest freezers have an accumulation of ice buildup and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024
